name: Blumgi Racers
author: Poki
description: Blumgi Racers is a fun racing game that puts your driving skills to the ultimate test! Speed through wild and challenging platforms, but here’s the twist—your car can fly! Take to the skies to bypass obstacles or gain a speed boost to beat the clock. Each level offers bronze, silver, and gold medals, so aim high and set new records. Plus, unlock an array of cute cars as you progress. Are you ready to make some world records? How to play Blumgi Racers? Speed Up: W or the up arrow key Brake/Reverse: S or the down arrow key Position your car: A/D or left and right arrow keys Fly: the space bar Restart: R Who created Blumgi Racers? Blumgi Racers is created by Blumgi. Play their other fun arcade games on Poki: Blumgi Rocket , Blumgi Slime , Blumgi Bloom , Blumgi Ball , Blumgi Castle , Blumgi Dragon , Blumgi Soccer , and Swingo ! How can I play Blumgi Racers for free? You can play Blumgi Racers for free on Poki. Can I play Blumgi Racers on mobile devices and desktop? Blumgi Racers can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
